Liver:Test.NAME: Is Lalacha Cute?
DESCRIPTIONS: Lalacha #g~cute~ #rni . NL

Liver:Moon.NAME: Lost Deity
DESCRIPTIONS: You pass through the coastline and enter a ~collapsed ruin~ filled with complex wiring and chip-like structures. NL Deep inside, you find a flooded room with a beam of light shining through a hole in the ceiling. A #bblue humanoid construct sits silently at the center. NL She whispers in #runintelligible language , five ~white neurons~ float above her head. When you look at them, the #bblue humanoid shakes her head #rmadly ... NL What will you do?

You pass through the coastline and enter a ~collapsed ruin~ filled with complex wiring and chip-like structures. NL Deep inside, you find a flooded room with a beam of light shining through a hole in the ceiling. A #bblue humanoid construct sits silently at the center. NL You learn this is an iterator named #bLooks to the Moon. Five ~white neurons~ float above her head. "Oh, please don't take them, little creature, they're #rall I have left. " she says, " #gOr could you give me more? If you have any." NL What will you do?
You give her the neurons you found. She seems more energetic. "I'm grateful... the relief is beyond words." #gShe gives you a special gift . "May this aid your journey."

"Yes, it's safe here. You can rest before the rain floods this place." You lie beside #bLooks to the Moon, she sits quietly beside you. NL ...After some time, you wake from sleep. Time to move on. The tranquility fills you with strength.

As you greedily reach for the floating ~neurons~, #bLooks to the Moon shakes her head in panic. "No! Let them go, they're all I have..." #rBut you ignore her painful twitching and pleas. NL ...When you extinguish the last light in the room, the ruin falls silent. #bLooks to the Moon lies there quietly, #rbut she can no longer speak.
You give her the neurons you found. She seems more energetic. Though you still don't understand the #bblue humanoid's words, you sense her gratitude. #gShe gives you a special gift.

Either way, she seems non-hostile. You decide to rest here. The #bblue humanoid sits quietly beside you. NL ...After some time, you wake from sleep. Time to continue. The tranquility fills you with strength.

You greedily reach for the floating ~neurons~, #rignoring the blue humanoid's painful twitching and pleas. Your instincts only tell you these neurons can save you from hunger. NL ...When you extinguish the last light in the room, the ruin falls silent. The #bblue humanoid lies there quietly, but she can no longer speak.
OPTIONS: [Give her a neuron] #rlose neuron, #ggain special relic.
[Eat neurons] #gmax HP+5, restore all HP and fullness. #rcursed—steal_light.

RedCat:Moon.NAME: Lost Deity
DESCRIPTIONS: Following the Watcher's guidance, you pass through the coastline and enter a ~collapsed ruin~ filled with complex wiring and chip-like structures. NL Deep inside, you find a flooded room with a beam of light shining through a hole in the ceiling. The humanoid construct named #bLooks to the Moon lies motionless at the center. Handing her the #gWaste Reset Key will awaken her from slumber. This is the mission given by your creator, and the purpose of your journey. What will you do?

You hand her the Waste Reset Key. ~Green neurons~ hover in the air, bursting into #gbrilliant light the moment they touch the #biterator . The #bblue humanoid construct slowly sits up, and with 5 newly generated white ~neurons~, the long-silent megastructure reactivates. NL "Hello there, little... creature. You... did you do this? I don't understand..." After a brief memory reorganization, #bLooks to the Moon observes you. "Oh. Little creature... you're not in good shape. I'm sorry, but your time is running out. "

"I don't understand why you'd spend your... last remaining... time helping me. But I'm truly grateful. As far as I know, few creatures pursue such noble things. You're truly... an amazing little creature." #bLooks to the Moon says. "I have something... I hope it helps you in your #rfinal moments ."
You don't have the #gWaste Reset Key in your hand, nor can you awaken #bLooks to the Moon. After resting briefly here, you leave. NL The #bblue humanoid construct still lies there, silent.

As you greedily reach for the floating ~neurons~, #bLooks to the Moon shakes her head in panic. "No! Let them go, they're all I have left..." #rBut you ignore her painful twitching and pleas. NL ...When you extinguish the last light in the room, the ruin falls silent. #bLooks to the Moon lies there quietly, #rbut she can no longer speak.
OPTIONS: [Give her the Waste Reset Key] (Lose Waste Reset Key)
[Eat neurons] #gmax HP+5, restore all HP and fullness. #rcursed—steal_light.

Liver:FiveRock.NAME: Above the Wall
DESCRIPTIONS: You stand in the shadow, gazing up at the towering wall—the Watcher guides you, saying #psomething lies above the clouds . NL But climbing up won't be easy. Danger lurks, #ryou may face mortal peril...

Despite your caution, you're caught by a white lizard hiding... or net spider... or mimic grass @caught@ ...Regardless, #ryou pay the price . NL At the tower's peak, you step onto a metal structure steeped in ancient history. Following murals downward, you enter a ~zero-gravity zone~ filled with electronic humming. #yFinally landing in a small room.
You notice a #ppink humanoid construct gazing down at you, speaking unintelligibly. Suddenly, an alien sensation floods your mind. After white light, #gyou seem to understand his words.

"Little creature, I know what you seek." he says, "Go west through Farm Arrays, then underground where the earth splits, to the deepest you can reach. My mark will grant you passage." NL An invisible force pulls you to the exit, "Now, #rleave my chamber. "
You turn away, ~too dangerous~, nothing is worth your life.

You notice a #ppink iterator gazing down at you. After a brief exchange, it says to you. "You seem to have contacted another iterator, so you may have noticed. We share a common trait. Inside us... there is a #rominous growth . I will give you something that might help."

"For me, it's too late to fix. For you, there might still be a way." he says, "Go west through Farm Arrays, then underground where the earth splits, to the deepest you can reach. The ancients built their temples there and danced their #rfoolish ritual dances ." NL #y~An invisible force~ pulls you to the exit , "I suggest you hurry."

Liver:FruitTree.NAME: Garden of Eden
DESCRIPTIONS: Walking along, a #p~sweet fragrance~ suddenly hits you... Then a flower-covered thicket appears before you. Twisted trunks entwined with violet vines, translucent #bblue fruits dangling... NL You feel dizzy—it might be hallucination, @but your body acts on its own...@ NL What will you do?
You abandon reason and feast. NL ...After some time, you wake. But the vision persists, leaving an obsession.
You pinch your tail to stay awake, resisting the hallucination.
You try to stay conscious, but stronger fragrance overwhelms.
Failing resistance, you lose consciousness to the vision.

Liver:GoldSea.NAME: Endless Sea
DESCRIPTIONS: Walking wearily deep in the tower, suddenly a huge explosion! Walls and floor crumble around you! NL After the blast, rubble floats in the void around you. Beneath your feet lies a golden endless sea. NL A voice echoes: "Like your kin did. Break the cycle... or follow instinct... or seek truth...?"
You feel ~weightless~, leap into the #yvoid sea , thoughts drift away, consciousness fades.
Your heart fills with #rnameless fury . Hatred burns your reason, wanting to #r~slaughter them all.~
You realize this world needs #gsaving . You see suffering, hear wailing—they need #gredemption.
NL Coming to, you find yourself still in the tower as if nothing happened. You feel #gstrengthened.
Luckily, you escaped the #rdanger zone before total ~collapse~.
You linger, pondering direction. Then #punintelligible language echoes. NL Coming to. #rYou're surrounded by monsters.
You linger, pondering direction. Then a voice: NL "Either #rflee , or #ywitness ." NL Coming to. #rYou're surrounded by monsters.
You #rslaughter the monsters. You stand atop the tower yet float in the void sea. Time to save all beings.
OPTIONS: [Locked] You're not strong enough to resist these monsters.

Liver:RainDeer.NAME: Docile Behemoth
DESCRIPTIONS: You hear a loud cry in the distance, and when you turn around, a #phuge deer-like creature appears before your eyes. It seems quite interested in something in your hand...
You place some food on the ground, and it bends down to chew, looking very happy. It sits on the ground watching you—perhaps you could ride it somewhere else...?
You climb onto the behemoth and guide it toward your destination... #r@but it suddenly starts shaking wildly@ , oops! You fall into the patch of tongue grass below!
It doesn't look very smart, so forget it.
OPTIONS: [Feed it something] #gRemove one card from your deck.
[Go East] #g50% chance to reach the shop, #r50% chance to lose 1 karma level.
[Go West] #g50% chance to reach the resting spot, #r50% chance to lose 1 karma level.

Rainworld:Watcher.NAME: Neuron Buffet
DESCRIPTIONS: You stray into a mechanized megastructure, filled with electronic hums and flickering lights. Mycelium blankets the pipes, and #p~va~ #r~ri~ #b~co~ #y~lo~ #g~ur~ #p~ed~ #r~ne~ #b~ur~ #b~ons~ drift in an orderly fashion through the air. NL You grab a neuron—it #qtrembles slightly#q in your hand. What will you do?
No one disturbs your feast, so you reach out and grab another neuron. What will you do?
As you gorge yourself, a huge three-headed construct spots you. Upon seeing you eat the neurons, its body gradually turns red and pounces at you!
You leave the unsettling structure before being discovered.
OPTIONS: [Feast to satiety] Eat #b1 neuron, gain #g1 max HP.
[Since I'm here] Eat #b1 more neuron, gain #g1 max HP. There's a chance of attracting #rsome trouble ……
[Locked] You have no way to escape now.

RedCat:Fucycle.NAME: Negative Cycle
DESCRIPTIONS: As time passes, you still wander in the spire. Suddenly, a #p~chilling sense of discomfort~ spreads from within to your entire body. Your #rvision blurs#, and everything you see turns scarlet and distorted. You feel weak, your body uncontrollably collapsing to the ground #rtwitching#. Your senses fail one by one, yet only hunger gnaws at your nerves…  NL True death approaches—#ryou know your time is running out#. NL What will you do?

Unwilling to stop here, you resolve to chase the slim glimmer of hope among countless possibilities. #gYour unwavering will and divine enlightenment help you overcome fate itself#. It may be a miracle—you feel weightless, all pain and torment vanishing in an instant. NL In a trance, you see a #ygolden void sea#, and ethereal spirits extend an invitation. You understand: your final destination lies there.
Discomfort wracks your body. You struggle to free yourself from the pain, but #ryou achieve nothing except growing weaker#.

You stop resisting, trying to adapt to the sensation… The ominous growth ravages and multiplies inside you, and you feel it merging with your being—as if you can hear its hungry snarl… NL After some time, you recover. #rBut your predatory urges grow harder to satisfy#.
Tormented by illness, you can barely move. You decide to rest through this difficult time. You waste a little more time—#rdeath looms closer#.
OPTIONS: [Resist Fate] #rcursed—negative_cycle, engage in a difficult battle.
